title: AN ACT TO AMEND SUB-ITEMS ONE TO SIXTEEN OF ITEM (d) FOR THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR, SUB-SECTION (e), TITLE B, SECTION ONE, REÂ­PUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS PUBLIC WORKS ACT OF NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 224 / 51 OG No. 6, 2818 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1254, June 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SUB-ITEMS ONE TO SIXTEEN OF ITEM (

d

) FOR THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR, SUB-SECTION (

e

), TITLE B, SECTION ONE, REÂPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS PUBLIC WORKS ACT OF NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sub-items one to sixteen of Item (

d

) for the Province of Samar, sub-section (

e

), Title B, section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred and twenty, otherwise known as the Public Works Act of nineteen hundred and fifty-three, are hereby amended to read as follows:

"(d) For the construction of the municipal

building of San Antonio.............................. P25,000.00

"(

d-1

) For the completion of the municipal

building of Catubig.............................................8,000.00

"(

d-2

) For the completion of the municipal

building of Palapag.............................................8,000.00

"(

d-3

) For the improvement of the 6-room academic

building of the Central Elementary

School of Pambujan...........................................5,000.00

"(

d-4

) For the completion of the municipal

building of Las Navas..................................... 4,000.00"

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1955.
